abilities.name: hyper-cutter
abilities.description: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokémon.

effectChanges.description: Doubles cut's grass-cutting radius on the overworld if any party Pokémon has this ability.

abilities.name: sand-veil
abilities.description: Increases evasion to 1.25× during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.

abilities.name: poison-heal
abilities.description: Heals for 1/8 max HP after each turn when poisoned in place of damage.

effectChanges.description: Poison still damages the Pokémon outside of battle.
